goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'university arms hotel'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '2 people' and '2 nights' starting from 'monday'.
If the booking fails how about 'sunday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'stevenage' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should 'leave after 11:45'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called university arms hotel
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 2 people and 2 nights starting from monday
If the booking fails how about sunday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to stevenage and should leave on tuesday
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave after 11:45
Make sure you get train ID and travel time
